Matches.CategoryName: Sri Lanka Tour of West Indies 2026
Matches.Description: The 3rd ODI of the  Sri Lanka Tour of West Indies 2026 marks the start of a three match Odi series. Watch West Indies vs Sri Lanka 3rd Odi live in HD on tapmad, with official match coverage and uninterrupted streaming. These top-ranked white-ball teams, to begin with a strong squad, West Indies will look to make the most of home conditions with a well-balanced squad, while Sri Lanka aim to challenge with a disciplined unit capable of competing in all aspects of the game. Both teams will be eager to gain an early advantage in the series.
